description: Comprehensive code templates for all Selenium actions - replaces hardcoded templates in inference_improved.py

comprehensive.python:
# Click {element_desc} with wait
from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait
from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC
from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By

wait = WebDriverWait(driver, 10)
element = wait.until(EC.element_to_be_clickable((By.{by_constant}, "{locator}")))
element.click()

simple.python:
# Enter text in {field_name} field
driver.find_element(By.{by_method}, "{locator}").clear()
driver.find_element(By.{by_method}, "{locator}").send_keys("{value}")

comprehensive.python:
# Enter text in {field_name} with wait
from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait
from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC
from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By

wait = WebDriverWait(driver, 10)
element = wait.until(EC.visibility_of_element_located((By.{by_constant}, "{locator}")))
element.clear()
element.send_keys("{value}")

simple.python:
# Select from dropdown
from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import Select
dropdown = driver.find_element(By.{by_method}, "{locator}")
select = Select(dropdown)
select.select_by_visible_text("{option}")

comprehensive.python:
# Select from dropdown with wait
from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait, Select
from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC
from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By

wait = WebDriverWait(driver, 10)
dropdown = wait.until(EC.element_to_be_clickable((By.{by_constant}, "{locator}")))
select = Select(dropdown)
select.select_by_visible_text("{option}")

simple.python:
# Verify element
element = driver.find_element(By.{by_method}, "{locator}")
assert element.is_displayed()

comprehensive.python:
# Verify {element_desc} with wait
from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait
from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC
from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By

wait = WebDriverWait(driver, 10)
element = wait.until(EC.visibility_of_element_located((By.{by_constant}, "{locator}")))
assert element.is_displayed()

# Navigate to URL with wait for page load
from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait

driver.get("{url}")
wait = WebDriverWait(driver, 10)
wait.until(lambda d: d.execute_script("return document.readyState") == "complete")

simple.python:
# Wait for element
from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait
from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC
wait = WebDriverWait(driver, 10)
wait.until(EC.visibility_of_element_located((By.{by_method}, "{locator}")))

comprehensive.python:
# Wait for element with multiple conditions
from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait
from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC
from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By

wait = WebDriverWait(driver, 10)
element = wait.until(EC.presence_of_element_located((By.{by_constant}, "{locator}")))
wait.until(EC.visibility_of(element))
wait.until(EC.element_to_be_clickable((By.{by_constant}, "{locator}")))

# Upload file with wait
from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait
from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC
from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By
import os

wait = WebDriverWait(driver, 10)
file_input = wait.until(EC.presence_of_element_located((By.{by_constant}, "{locator}")))
absolute_path = os.path.abspath("{file_path}")
file_input.send_keys(absolute_path)

simple.python:
# Search for text
search_box = driver.find_element(By.{by_method}, "{locator}")
search_box.send_keys("{value}")

comprehensive.python:
# Search for text with wait
from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait
from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC
from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By

wait = WebDriverWait(driver, 10)
search_box = wait.until(EC.visibility_of_element_located((By.{by_constant}, "{locator}")))
search_box.clear()
search_box.send_keys("{value}")

# Verify page title with wait
from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait
from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC

wait = WebDriverWait(driver, 10)
wait.until(EC.title_contains("{expected_title}"))
assert driver.title == "{expected_title}", f"Expected '{expected_title}' but got '{{driver.title}}'"

# Verify message with wait
from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait
from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC
from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By

wait = WebDriverWait(driver, 10)
message = wait.until(EC.visibility_of_element_located((By.{by_constant}, "{locator}")))
assert message.is_displayed()
assert "{expected_text}" in message.text, f"Expected text not found in: {{message.text}}"

# Verify element text with wait
from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait
from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC
from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By

wait = WebDriverWait(driver, 10)
element = wait.until(EC.visibility_of_element_located((By.{by_constant}, "{locator}")))
actual_text = element.text
assert actual_text == "{expected_text}", f"Expected '{expected_text}' but got '{{actual_text}}'"

# Scroll element into view
from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait
from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC
from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By
import time

wait = WebDriverWait(driver, 10)
element = wait.until(EC.presence_of_element_located((By.XPATH, "//*[contains(text(), '{element_ref}')]" )))
driver.execute_script("arguments[0].scrollIntoView({{behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center'}});", element)
time.sleep(0.5)

# Close dialog/modal with wait
from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait
from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC
from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By

wait = WebDriverWait(driver, 10)
close_button = wait.until(EC.element_to_be_clickable((By.{by_constant}, "{locator}")))
close_button.click()
# Wait for dialog to disappear
wait.until(EC.invisibility_of_element_located((By.{by_constant}, "{locator}")))

# Handle alert with wait
from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait
from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC

wait = WebDriverWait(driver, 10)
alert = wait.until(EC.alert_is_present())
alert_text = alert.text
print(f"Alert text: {{alert_text}}")
alert.{alert_action}()  # accept() or dismiss()
